  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> OAuth2 Token authentication with passing credentials via POST: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $Curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ") ] # # Change path to your CACert PEM File. Set Variable [ $CacertPath ; Value: "C:\Users\Public\cacert.pem" ] // Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionCAInfo "; $curl ; $cacertPath ) ] // Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost "; $curl ; 2 ) ] // Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyPeer "; $curl ; 1 ) ] Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionVerbose "; $curl ; 1) ] # # credentials Set Variable [ $secret ; Value: "xxx" ] Set Variable [ $client ; Value: "yyy" ] Set Variable [ $domain ; Value: "zzz" ] Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "https://" & $domain & "/auth/realms/demo/protocol/openid-connect/token") ] # # POST with form encoding Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader "; $curl ; "content-type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded") ] Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl ; "grant_type=client_credentials&client_id="& $client & "&client_secret=" & $secret ) ] # # run it Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Perform "; $curl ) ] Set Variable [ $DebugText ; Value: MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; $curl ) ] Set Variable [ $ResultText ; Value: MBS (" CURL.GetResultAsText "; $curl ) ] If [ $result = "OK" ] # extract token Set Variable [ $Token ; Value: JSONGetElement ( $ResultText ; "access_token" ) ] Set Field [ tbl_debugger::token ; $Token ] End If Set Field [ tbl_debugger::header ; $DebugText ] Set Variable [ $Result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Release "; $curl ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.New") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Curl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Change path to your CACert PEM File.</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"C:\Users\Public\cacert.pem" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$CacertPath</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionCAInfo"; $curl; $cacertPath ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost"; $curl; 2 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyPeer"; $curl; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionVerbose"; $curl; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> credentials</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"xxx" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$secret</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"yyy" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$client</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"zzz" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$domain</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; $curl; "https://" & $domain & "/auth/realms/demo/protocol/openid-connect/token") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> POST with form encoding</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader"; $curl; "content-type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl; "grant_type=client_credentials&client_id="& $client & "&client_secret=" & $secret) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> run it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Perform"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$DebugText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.GetResultAsText"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$ResultText</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="68" name="If">
    <Restore state="False"/>
    <Calculation> $result = "OK" </Calculation>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> extract token</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>JSONGetElement ( $ResultText; "access_token" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Token</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$Token </Calculation>
    <Field table="tbl_debugger" id="99999" name="token "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="70" name="End If"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>$DebugText </Calculation>
    <Field table="tbl_debugger" id="99999" name="header "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Cleanup"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$Result</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Sets custom request PATCH: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionCustomRequest "; $curl ; "PATCH" ) ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl ; $json ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionCustomRequest"; $curl; "PATCH" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl; $json ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Upload XML with ISO-8859-1 encoding: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl ; "<?xml version=\" 1.0 \" encoding=\"ISO-8859-1\"?><test>Hällo Wörld</test>"; "ISO-8859-1") ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader "; $curl ; "Content-Type: text/xml") ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; $curl; "<?xml version=\"1.0\" encoding=\"ISO-8859-1\"?><test>Hällo Wörld</test>"; "ISO-8859-1") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader"; $curl; "Content-Type: text/xml") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Publish a topic for MQTT server in a Let statement: Copy Text Copy XML Let([ // Send in file MQTT curl = MBS (" CURL.New "); // connect to MQTT server and send r = MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; curl; MQTT::URL ); r = MBS ("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; curl; MQTT::Payload ; "UTF-8"); // r = MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUserName "; curl; MQTT::Username ); r = MBS (" CURL.SetOptionPassword "; curl; MQTT::Password ); // // send request now result = MBS (" CURL.Perform "; curl); // // for checking error details $$debugLog = MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; curl; "UTF-8"); $$output = MBS (" CURL.GetResultAsText "; curl; "UTF-8"); // r = MBS (" CURL.Release "; curl)]; result) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let([
// Send in file MQTT
curl = MBS("CURL.New");
// connect to MQTT server and send
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; curl; MQTT::URL);
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; curl; MQTT::Payload; "UTF-8");
// 
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionUsername"; curl; MQTT::Username);
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionPassword"; curl; MQTT::Password);
// 
// send request now
result = MBS("CURL.Perform"; curl);
// 
// for checking error details
$$debugLog = MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; curl; "UTF-8");
$$output = MBS("CURL.GetResultAsText"; curl; "UTF-8");
// 
r = MBS("CURL.Release"; curl)]; result)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.GetOptionPostFields CURL.SetOptionCookieList CURL.SetOptionPostQuote CURL.SetOptionProtocols CURL.SetOptionSSLCert CURL.SetOptionSSLKey CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyPeer CURL.SetOptionUpload CURL.SetOptionURL Release notes Version 10.4 Fixed an issue with CURL.SetOptionPostFields to accept > 8 MB in size of post data. parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

examples.label: OAuth2 Token authentication with passing credentials via POST:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$Curl
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.New
") ]
#
# Change path to your CACert PEM File.
Set Variable [
$CacertPath
; Value: "C:\Users\Public\cacert.pem" ]
// Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
( "
CURL.SetOptionCAInfo
";
$curl
;
$cacertPath
) ]
// Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
( "
CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost
";
$curl
; 2 ) ]
// Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
( "
CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyPeer
";
$curl
; 1 ) ]
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionVerbose
";
$curl
; 1) ]
#
# credentials
Set Variable [
$secret
; Value: "xxx" ]
Set Variable [
$client
; Value: "yyy" ]
Set Variable [
$domain
; Value: "zzz" ]
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionURL
";
$curl
; "https://" &
$domain
& "/auth/realms/demo/protocol/openid-connect/token") ]
#
# POST with form encoding
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader
";
$curl
; "content-type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded") ]
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("CURL.SetOptionPostFields";
$curl
; "grant_type=client_credentials&client_id="&
$client
& "&client_secret=" &
$secret
) ]
#
# run it
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.Perform
";
$curl
) ]
Set Variable [
$DebugText
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.GetDebugMessages
";
$curl
) ]
Set Variable [
$ResultText
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.GetResultAsText
";
$curl
) ]
If [
$result
= "OK" ]
# extract token
Set Variable [
$Token
; Value: JSONGetElement (
$ResultText
; "access_token" ) ]
Set Field [
tbl_debugger::token
;
$Token
]
End If
Set Field [
tbl_debugger::header
;
$DebugText
]
Set Variable [
$Result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.Release
";
$curl
) ]

examples.label: Publish a topic for MQTT server in a Let statement:
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>Let([
// Send in file MQTT
curl = MBS("CURL.New");
// connect to MQTT server and send
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; curl; MQTT::URL);
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionPostFields"; curl; MQTT::Payload; "UTF-8");
// 
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionUsername"; curl; MQTT::Username);
r = MBS("CURL.SetOptionPassword"; curl; MQTT::Password);
// 
// send request now
result = MBS("CURL.Perform"; curl);
// 
// for checking error details
$$debugLog = MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; curl; "UTF-8");
$$output = MBS("CURL.GetResultAsText"; curl; "UTF-8");
// 
r = MBS("CURL.Release"; curl)]; result)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionPostQuote
functions.description:
Sets the list of FTP or SFTP commands to pass to the server after your FTP transfer request. The commands will only be run if no error occurred. Disable this operation again by passing no value to this function. This option takes a list of items. So this function takes a variable number of arguments. If you call function with 2 parameters, you set an empty list. If you call it with 5 parameters, you set a list with 3 values. If you want to do a ftp operation instead of download/upload/directory listing, please use CURL.SetOptionQuote . See also CURL.SetOptionQuote and CURL.SetOptionPreQuote . File names may be passed with quotes to include spaces in file names. This function takes variable number of parameters. Pass as much parameters as needed separated by the semicolon in FileMaker. Please repeat Value parameter as often as you need. See also POSTQUOTE option in CURL manual. Examples Create folder in FTP: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl ; "MKD testfolder" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl; "MKD testfolder" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Rename file using two FTP commands: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "RNFR foo.txt"; "RNTO bar.txt" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "RNFR foo.txt"; "RNTO bar.txt" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Delete file after upload for FTP: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl ; "DELE docs/test.txt" ) // URL is to domain only and relative path in quote. <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl; "DELE docs/test.txt" )

// URL is to domain only and relative path in quote.</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Delete folder after upload: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl ; "RMD testfolder" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl; "RMD testfolder" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Set file permissions: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "SITE CHMOD 777 testfile") <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "SITE CHMOD 777 testfile")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Call with three parameters: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; handle; $value1 ; $value2 ; $value3 ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; handle; $value1; $value2; $value3 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Rename file for SFTP commands: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "rename \"old name.txt\" \"new namew.txt\"" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote" ; $curl ; "rename \"old name.txt\" \"new namew.txt\"" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Create folder with SFTP: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl ; "mkdir testPost" ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl; "mkdir testPost" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.GetOptionPostQuote CURL.GetOptionPreQuote CURL.SetOptionPassword CURL.SetOptionPost CURL.SetOptionPostFields CURL.SetOptionPostRedir CURL.SetOptionPreQuote CURL.SetOptionProtocols CURL.SetOptionProxyAuth CURL.SetOptionQuote Blog Entries SFTP Upload with temporary file Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 5th June 2021 CURL.SetOptionPostFields - CURL.SetOptionPostRedir 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionPostRedir
functions.description: Sets the redirect policy. Pass a bitmask to control how libcurl acts on redirects after POSTs that get a 301 or 302 response back. A parameter with bit 0 set (value CURL_REDIR_POST_301) tells the library to respect RFC 2616/10.3.2 and not convert POST requests into GET requests when following a 301 redirection. Setting bit 1 (value CURL_REDIR_POST_302) makes libcurl maintain the request method after a 302 redirect. CURL_REDIR_POST_ALL is a convenience define that sets both bits. The non-RFC behavior is ubiquitous in web browsers, so the library does the conversion by default to maintain consistency. However, a server may require a POST to remain a POST after such a redirection. This option is meaningful only when setting CURL.SetOptionFollowLocation . (This option was known as CURLOPT_POST301 up to 7.19.0 as it only supported the 301 way before then)

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionPreQuote
functions.description:
Sets the list of FTP commands to pass to the server after the transfer type is set. Disable this operation again by passing no value to this function. Before curl version 7.15.6, if you also set CURL.SetOptionNoBody to 1, this option didn't work. This option takes a list of items. So this function takes a variable number of arguments. If you call function with 2 parameters, you set an empty list. If you call it with 5 parameters, you set a list with 3 values. See also CURL.SetOptionQuote and CURL.SetOptionPostQuote . File names may be passed with quotes to include spaces in file names. This function takes variable number of parameters. Pass as much parameters as needed separated by the semicolon in FileMaker. Please repeat Value parameter as often as you need. See also PREQUOTE option in CURL manual. Examples Create folder before upload: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionPreQuote"; $curl ; "MKD testfolder" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProtocolsString
functions.description: The protocols to allow. Pass a string that holds a comma-separated list of case insensitive protocol names (URL schemes) to allow in the transfer. This option allows applications to use libcurl built to support a wide range of protocols but still limit specific transfers to only be allowed to use a subset of them. By default, libcurl accepts all protocols it was built with support for. See also CURL.SetOptionReditProtocolsString. If trying to set a non-existing protocol or if no matching protocol at all is set, it returns error. These are the available protocols: DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPE, RTMPS, RTMPT, RTMPTE, RTMPTS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP You can set "ALL" as a short-cut to enable all protocols. Note that by setting all, you may enable protocols that were not supported the day you write this but are introduced in a future libcurl version. CURL.Protocols can be used to get a list of all supported protocols in the current libcurl. CURL.GetProtocol function is the recommended way to figure out the protocol used in a previous transfer.

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProxy
functions.description:
Set HTTP proxy to use. The parameter should be a text string holding the host name or dotted IP address. To specify port number in this string, append :[port] to the end of the host name. The proxy string may be prefixed with [protocol]:// since any such prefix will be ignored. The proxy's port number may optionally be specified with the separate option. If not specified, libcurl will default to using port 1080 for proxies. see also CURL.SetOptionProxyPort . When you tell the library to use an HTTP proxy, libcurl will transparently convert operations to HTTP even if you specify an FTP URL etc. This may have an impact on what other features of the library you can use, such as CURL.SetOptionQuote and similar FTP specifics that don't work unless you tunnel through the HTTP proxy. Such tunneling is activated with CURL.SetOptionHTTPProxyTunnel . libcurl respects the environment variables http_proxy, ftp_proxy, all_proxy etc, if any of those are set. The CURL.SetOptionProxy option does however override any possibly set environment variables. Setting the proxy string to "" (an empty string) will explicitly disable the use of a proxy, even if there is an environment variable set for it. Since 7.14.1, the proxy host string given in environment variables can be specified the exact same way as the proxy can be set with CURL.SetOptionProxy, include protocol prefix (http://) and embedded user + password. Since 7.21.7, the proxy string may be specified with a protocol:// prefix to specify alternative proxy protocols. Use socks4://, socks4a://, socks5:// or socks5h:// (the last one to enable socks5 and asking the proxy to do the resolving, also known as CURLPROXY_SOCKS5_HOSTNAME type) to request the specific SOCKS version to be used. No protocol specified, http:// and all others will be treated as HTTP proxies. Setting the property and getting back OK does just mean that the plugin passed the value. It does not confirm that the proxy is working or used. See also PROXY option in CURL manual. Examples Set a proxy: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionProxy"; $curl ; "http://cache.local.com/:8000“) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionProxy"; $curl; "http://cache.local.com/:8000“)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionNoProxy CURL.SetOptionPort CURL.SetOptionPreProxy CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKey CURL.SetOptionProxyType CURL.SetOptionProxyUsername CURL.SetOptionQuote CURL.SetOptionRange CURL.SetOptionUpload CURL.SetOptionURL Release notes Version 11.3 Added CURL.SetOptionCAInfoBlob and CURL.SetOptionProxyCAInfoBlob functions. Version 10.4 Changed CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob to replace line endings for keys to LF if needed. Version 10.3 Added CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob functions. Version 8.3 Added CURL.SetOptionDisallowUserNameInURL , CURL.SetOptionProxyTLS13Ciphers and CURL.SetOptionTLS13Ciphers . Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Comparing Base Elements Plugin to MBS FileMaker Plugin Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 5th December 2016 CURL.SetOptionProtocolsString - CURL.SetOptionProxyAuth 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProxyAuth
functions.description: Sets which authentication methods are used. Pass a number as parameter, which is set to a bitmask, to tell libcurl which authentication method(s) you want it to use for your proxy authentication. If more than one bit is set, libcurl will first query the site to see what authentication methods it supports and then pick the best one you allow it to use. For some methods, this will induce an extra network round-trip. Set the actual name and password with the CURL.SetOptionProxyUsername option. The bitmask can be constructed by or'ing together the bits listed above for the CURL.SetOptionHTTPAuth option. As of this writing, only Basic, Digest and NTLM work. See also PROXYAUTH option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionPreQuote CURL.SetOptionProtocols CURL.SetOptionProxy CURL.SetOptionProxyCAInfo CURL.SetOptionProxyCAPath CURL.SetOptionProxyHeader CURL.SetOptionProxyPort CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKey CURL.SetOptionProxyUsername CURL.SetOptionSocks5Auth Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 18th August 2014 CURL.SetOptionProxy - CURL.SetOptionProxyCAInfo 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert
functions.description: Sets the proxy issuer SSL certificate filename. Pass a string naming a file holding a CA certificate in PEM format. If the option is set, an additional check against the peer certificate is performed to verify the issuer of the the HTTPS proxy is indeed the one associated with the certificate provided by the option. This additional check is useful in multi-level PKI where one needs to enforce that the peer certificate is from a specific branch of the tree. This option makes sense only when used in combination with the CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer option. Otherwise, the result of the check is not considered as failure. A specific error code (CURLE_SSL_ISSUER_ERROR) is defined with the option, which is returned if the setup of the SSL/TLS session has failed due to a mismatch with the issuer of peer certificate ( CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer has to be set too for the check to fail). See CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob to pass certificate as container or text. See also PROXY_ISSUERCERT option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionIssuerCert CURL.SetOptionProxy CURL.SetOptionProxyHeader CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob CURL.SetOptionProxyPassword CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCert CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVersion CURL.SetOptionProxyUsername Release notes Version 10.4 Changed CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob to replace line endings for keys to LF if needed. Version 10.3 Added CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob functions. functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob
functions.description:
Set proxy issuer SSL certificate from memory blob. Pass a text or container value, which contains binary data of a CA certificate in PEM format. If the option is set, an additional check against the peer certificate is performed to verify the issuer of the the HTTPS proxy is indeed the one associated with the certificate provided by the option. This additional check is useful in multi-level PKI where one needs to enforce that the peer certificate is from a specific branch of the tree. This option should be used in combination with the CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer option. Otherwise, the result of the check is not considered as failure. A specific error code (CURLE_SSL_ISSUER_ERROR) is defined with the option, which is returned if the setup of the SSL/TLS session has failed due to a mismatch with the issuer of peer certificate ( CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer has to be set too for the check to fail). This option is an alternative to CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert which instead expects a file name as input. See also PROXY_ISSUERCERT_BLOB option in CURL manual. Examples Set certificate with container field: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob"; $curl ; Settings::ProxyIssuerCert ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob"; $curl; Settings::ProxyIssuerCert)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob CURL.SetOptionProxy CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob CURL.SetOptionProxySSLVerifyPeer Release notes Version 10.4 Changed CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob to replace line endings for keys to LF if needed. If the value is set to 1 (one), it tells libcurl to set the transfer mode (binary or ASCII) for FTP transfers done via an HTTP proxy, by appending ;type=a or ;type=i to the URL. functions.name: CURL.SetOptionProxyType
functions.description:
Sets the type of the proxy. Available options for this are CURLPROXY_HTTP (0), CURLPROXY_HTTP_1_0 (1), CURLPROXY_SOCKS4 (4), CURLPROXY_SOCKS5 (5), CURLPROXY_SOCKS4A (6) and CURLPROXY_SOCKS5_HOSTNAME (7). The HTTP type is default. If you set proxy type to CURLPROXY_HTTP_1_0 (0), it will only affect how libcurl speaks to a proxy when CONNECT is used. The HTTP version used for "regular" HTTP requests is instead controlled with CURL.SetOptionHTTPVersion . See also PROXYTYPE option in CURL manual. Examples Set Socks 5 proxy: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionProxyType"; $curl ; 5 ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionQuickExit
functions.description:
Whether to allow to exit quickly. Pass a number as a parameter, 1 meaning that when recovering from a timeout, libcurl should skip lengthy cleanups that are intended to avoid all kinds of leaks (threads etc.), as the caller program is about to call exit() anyway. This allows for a swift termination after a DNS timeout for example, by canceling and/or forgetting about a resolver thread, at the expense of a possible (though short-lived) leak of associated resources. This should not be needed to be used in FileMaker. See also QUICK_EXIT option in CURL manual. Examples Skip cleanup for this curl session: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionQuickExit"; $curl ; 1 ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionQuickExit"; $curl; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionPipeWait Release notes Version 13.0 Added CURL.SetOptionCACacheTimeout and CURL.SetOptionQuickExit functions. Blog Entries New in MBS FileMaker Plugin 13.0 MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 13.0pr5 Created 22nd December 2022 , last changed 7th May 2023 CURL.SetOptionPut - CURL.SetOptionQuote 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionQuote
functions.description:
Sets the list of FTP or SFTP commands to pass to the server prior to your FTP request. This will be done before any other commands are issued (even before the CWD command for FTP). Disable this operation again by passing no value to this function. When speaking to a FTP (or SFTP) server, prefix the command with an asterisk (*) to make libCURL continue even if the command fails as by default libCURL will stop at first failure. The set of valid FTP commands depends on the server (see RFC 959 for a list of mandatory commands). The valid SFTP commands are: chgrp, chmod, chown, ln, mkdir, pwd, rename, rm, rmdir, symlink. Paths can have quotes for spaces. Use either double or single quotes. This option takes a list of items. So this function takes a variable number of arguments. If you call function with 2 parameters, you set an empty list. If you call it with 5 parameters, you set a list with 3 values. See also CURL.SetOptionPreQuote and CURL.SetOptionPostQuote . Here is list of raw FTP commands: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_FTP_commands File names may be passed with quotes to include spaces in file names. On SFTP you can use "pwd" command to print current full path and discover what ~ may mean for the home path. For the "rm" command to delete files with SFTP, you need a path which can't include "~" to reference the home folder. This function takes variable number of parameters. Pass as much parameters as needed separated by the semicolon in FileMaker. Please repeat Value parameter as often as you need. See also QUOTE option in CURL manual. Examples Delete file only with FTP: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl ; "DELE test.txt" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl; "DELE test.txt" )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Delete folder: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl ; "RMD testfolder" ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl; "RMD testfolder" )</Calculation>
    </Value>

</fmxmlsnippet> Move file on SFTP in done folder with variables and quotes: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ("CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl ; // first delete "rm " & "\"" & $Path & $folder & "Done/" & $$FileName & "\""; // then move "rename " & "\"" & $Path & $folder & "/" & $$FileName & "\"" & " " & "\"" & $Path & $folder & "Done/" & $$FileName & "\"") <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

// first delete 
"rm " & "\"" & $Path  & $folder & "Done/" & $$FileName  & "\"";
// then move
"rename " & "\"" & $Path & $folder  & "/" & $$FileName & "\"" & " " & "\"" & $Path  & $folder & "Done/" & $$FileName  & "\"")</Calculation>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Change file permissions via SFTP: Copy Text Copy XML # set permissions to 777, so everyone can read/write/execute the file. Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionQuote"; $curl ; "chmod 777 /Users/cs/Pictures/test.jpg" ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

</fmxmlsnippet> Rename file after upload for SFTP: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "sftp://test.com/folder/temp.jpg") ] # credentials Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionPassword "; $curl ; CURL Test::Password ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionUserName "; $curl ; CURL Test::Name ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes "; $curl ; 2+8 ) ] # data to upload from container field Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUpload "; $curl ; 1) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetInputFile "; $curl ; CURL Test::Image ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetInputFile "; $curl ; CURL Test::Image ) ] # Require TLS 1.2 for FTP over SSL: Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionUseSSL "; $curl ; 3 ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion "; $curl ; 6 ) ] # download existing file, rename after upload Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionPostQuote "; $curl ; "*rm image.jpg"; "rename temp.jpg image.jpg" ) ] # see progress in debug messages Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ( " CURL.SetDebugWithProgress "; $curl ; 1 ) ] # perform it Set Field [ CURL Test::Result ; MBS (" CURL.Perform "; $curl ) ] Set Field [ CURL Test::debug ; MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; $curl ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Release "; $curl ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.New") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$curl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionURL"; $curl; "sftp://test.com/folder/temp.jpg") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> credentials</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPassword"; $curl; CURL Test::Password) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionUsername"; $curl; CURL Test::Name) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes"; $curl; 2+8 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> data to upload from container field</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionUpload"; $curl; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetInputFile"; $curl; CURL Test::Image) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetInputFile"; $curl; CURL Test::Image) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> Require TLS 1.2 for FTP over SSL:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionUseSSL"; $curl; 3 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion"; $curl; 6 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> download existing file, rename after upload</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionPostQuote"; $curl; "*rm image.jpg"; "rename temp.jpg image.jpg" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> see progress in debug messages</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetDebugWithProgress"; $curl; 1 ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> perform it</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; $curl) </Calculation>
    <Field table="CURL Test" id="99999" name="debug "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Release"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionRange
functions.description:
Sets the range. Pass a text as parameter, which should contain the specified range you want. It should be in the format "X-Y", where X or Y may be left out. HTTP transfers also support several intervals, separated with commas as in "X-Y,N-M". Using this kind of multiple intervals will cause the HTTP server to send the response document in pieces (using standard MIME separation techniques). For RTSP, the formatting of a range should follow RFC 2326 Section 12.29. For RTSP, byte ranges are not permitted. Instead, ranges should be given in npt, utc, or smpte formats. Pass an empty string to this option to disable the use of ranges. Ranges work on HTTP, FTP, FILE (since 7.18.0), and RTSP (since 7.20.0) transfers only. See also RANGE option in CURL manual. Examples Get the first 200 bytes: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionRange"; $curl ; "0-199") ] Set Variable [ $r ; MBS ( " CURL.SetOptionURL ; $curl ; "https://example.com") ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionRange"; $curl; "0-199") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionURL; $curl; "https://example.com") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionNetRC CURL.SetOptionPort CURL.SetOptionPost CURL.SetOptionProxy CURL.SetOptionPut CURL.SetOptionQuote CURL.SetOptionReferer CURL.SetOptionResolve CURL.SetOptionSSLKey CURL.SetOptionURL Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 6th September 2021 CURL.SetOptionRandomFile - CURL.SetOptionRedirProtocols 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionRedirProtocolsString
functions.description: Sets the protocols allowed to redirect to. Pass string that holds a comma-separated list of case insensitive protocol names (URL schemes). That list limits what protocols libcurl may use in a transfer that it follows to in a redirect when CURL.SetOptionFollowLocation is enabled. This option allows applications to limit specific transfers to only be allowed to use a subset of protocols in redirections. Protocols denied by CURL.SetOptionProtocolsString are not overridden by this option. By default libcurl will allow HTTP, HTTPS, FTP and FTPS on redirects (since 7.65.2). Older versions of libcurl allowed all protocols on redirect except several disabled for security reasons: Since 7.19.4 FILE and SCP are disabled, and since 7.40.0 SMB and SMBS are also disabled. These are the available protocols: DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, POP3, POP3S, RTMP, RTMPE, RTMPS, RTMPT, RTMPTE, RTMPTS, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP You can set "ALL" as a short-cut to enable all protocols. Note that by setting all, you may enable protocols that were not supported the day you write this but are introduced in a future libcurl version. If trying to set a non-existing protocol or if no matching protocol at all is set, it returns error. Default HTTP, HTTPS, FTP and FTPS (Added in 7.65.2). Older versions defaulted to all protocols except FILE, SCP and since 7.40.0 SMB and SMBS.

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionReferer
functions.description:
Sets the referrer. This string will be used to set the Referer: header in the http request sent to the remote server. This can be used to fool servers or scripts. You can also set any custom header with CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader . See also REFERER option in CURL manual. Examples Set referrer: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionReferer"; $curl ; "http://www.mbsplugins.eu/" ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionReferer"; $curl; "http://www.mbsplugins.eu/" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionAutoReferer CURL.SetOptionHeader CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader CURL.SetOptionIssuerCert CURL.SetOptionKRBLevel CURL.SetOptionResolve CURL.SetOptionResumeFrom CURL.SetOptionSSLCert CURL.SetOptionTimeOut CURL.SetOptionVerbose Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 5th September 2021 CURL.SetOptionRedirProtocolsString - CURL.SetOptionRequestTarget 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionResolve
functions.description: Sets resolve list. Provide custom host name to IP address resolves. This function takes variable number of parameters. Pass as much parameters as needed separated by the semicolon in FileMaker. Please repeat Value parameter as often as you need. See also RESOLVE option in CURL manual. See also CURL.GetOptionResolve CURL.SetOptionDOHURL CURL.SetOptionIPResolve CURL.SetOptionPreQuote CURL.SetOptionQuote CURL.SetOptionRange CURL.SetOptionReferer CURL.SetOptionTimeValue CURL.SetOptionUserName CURL.SetOptionVerbose Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls Created 15th April 2018 , last changed 5th June 2021 CURL.SetOptionRequestTarget - CURL.SetOptionResumeFrom 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionResumeFrom
functions.description: Sets the resume from offset. Pass a number as parameter. It contains the offset in number of bytes that you want the transfer to start from. Set this option to 0 to make the transfer start from the beginning (effectively disabling resume). For FTP, set this option to -1 to make the transfer start from the end of the target file (useful to continue an interrupted upload). When doing uploads with FTP, the resume position is where in the local/source file libcurl should try to resume the upload from and it will then append the source file to the remote target file. See also RESUME_FROM option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionMailFrom CURL.SetOptionReferer Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls MBS Filemaker Plugin, version 3.3pr1 Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 18th April 2016 CURL.SetOptionResolve - CURL.SetOptionSASLAuthZID 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSASLAuthZID
functions.description: Sets the authorisation identity (identity to act as). Pass a text as parameter, which should be pointing to the authorisation identity (authzid) for the transfer. Only applicable to the PLAIN SASL authentication mechanism where it is optional. When not specified only the authentication identity (authcid) as specified by the username will be sent to the server, along with the password. The server will derive a authzid from the authcid when not provided, which it will then uses internally. When the authzid is specified, the use of which is server dependent, it can be used to access another user's inbox, that the user has been granted access to, or a shared mailbox for example. See also SASL_AUTHZID option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionFTPSSLAuth CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes CURL.SetOptionSSLOptions CURL.SetOptionTLSAuthType Release notes Version 9.4 Added CURL.SetOptionSASLAuthZID function. Blog Entries MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 9.4pr7 Created 11st September 2019 , last changed 11st September 2019 CURL.SetOptionResumeFrom - CURL.SetOptionSASLIR 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes
functions.description: Sets the SSL authentication types. Pass a number set to a bitmask consisting of one or more of CURLSSH_AUTH_PUBLICKEY, CURLSSH_AUTH_PASSWORD, CURLSSH_AUTH_HOST, CURLSSH_AUTH_KEYBOARD. Set CURLSSH_AUTH_ANY to let libcurl pick one.

examples.label: Use password, no private key:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
( "CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes";
$curl
; 2+8 )]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes"; $curl; 2+8 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

examples.label: Download file via SFTP to file on disk:
examples.text_code:
Set Variable [
$curl
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.New
") ]
# set download URL, e.g. sftp://monkeybreadsoftware.net/test.jpg
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionURL
";
$curl
;
SFTP Download::URL
)]
# build file path on disk and open output file
Set Variable [
$name
; Value:GetValue(
SFTP Download::FileName
; 1)]
Set Variable [
$path
; Value:
MBS
( "
Path.AddPathComponent
";
SFTP Download::FolderPath
;
$name
)]
Set Variable [
$r
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.CreateOutputFile
";
$curl
;
$path
)]
# login only via password
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
( "CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes";
$curl
; 2+8 )]
# set credentials
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionUserName
";
$curl
;
SFTP Download::UserName
)]
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.SetOptionPassword
";
$curl
;
SFTP Download::Password
)]
# run transfer
Set Field [
SFTP Download::ErrorCode
;
MBS
("
CURL.Perform
";
$curl
)]
# check debug log for errors
Set Field [
SFTP Download::Debug
;
MBS
("
CURL.GetDebugMessages
";
$curl
)]
# free CURL session
Set Variable [
$result
; Value:
MBS
("
CURL.Release
";
$curl
)]
examples.xml_code:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.New") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$curl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set download URL, e.g. sftp://monkeybreadsoftware.net/test.jpg</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; $curl; SFTP Download::URL )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> build file path on disk and open output file</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>GetValue(SFTP Download::FileName; 1)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$name</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "Path.AddPathComponent"; SFTP Download::FolderPath; $name )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$path</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.CreateOutputFile"; $curl; $path)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> login only via password</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes"; $curl; 2+8 )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> set credentials</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionUsername"; $curl; SFTP Download::UserName )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionPassword"; $curl; SFTP Download::Password )</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> run transfer</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Perform"; $curl)</Calculation>
    <Field table="SFTP Download" id="99999" name="ErrorCode"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> check debug log for errors</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; $curl)</Calculation>
    <Field table="SFTP Download" id="99999" name="Debug"/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> free CURL session</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Release"; $curl)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet>

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHCompression
functions.description: Enable/disable SSH compression. See also SSH_COMPRESSION option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionCookieSession CURL.SetOptionSSLCipherList CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion Created 15th April 2018 , last changed 16th April 2018 CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes - CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeyMD5 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The option value. Pass 1 to enable or 0 to disable.

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeyMD5
functions.description: Sets MD5 hash for public key. Pass a string containing 32 hexadecimal digits. The string should be the 128 bit MD5 checksum of the remote host's public key, and libcurl will reject the connection to the host unless the md5sums match. This option is only for SCP and SFTP transfers. See also SSH_HOST_PUBLIC_KEY_MD5 option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeySHA256 CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 5th July 2015 CURL.SetOptionSSHCompression - CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeySHA256 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeySHA256
functions.description: Sets the SHA256 hash of SSH server public key. Pass a string containing a Base64-encoded SHA256 hash of the remote host's public key. The transfer will fail if the given hash does not match the hash the remote host provides. See also SSH_HOST_PUBLIC_KEY_SHA256 option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeyMD5 Release notes Version 12.4 Added CURL.SetOptionMaxLifeTimeConnection , CURL.SetOptionMimeOptions and CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeySHA256 functions. Blog Entries MBS FileMaker Plugin 12.4 MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 12.4pr3 Created 22nd August 2022 , last changed 22nd August 2022 CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeyMD5 - CURL.SetOptionSSHKnownHosts 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHKnownHosts
functions.description: Sets the file path of the known_host file to use. The known_hosts file should use the OpenSSH file format as supported by libssh2. If this file is specified, libcurl will only accept connections with hosts that are known and present in that file, with a matching public key. See also SSH_KNOWNHOSTS option in CURL manual. See also CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 5th July 2015 CURL.SetOptionSSHHostPublicKeySHA256 - CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile
functions.description:
Sets the file path for your private key. If not used, libcurl defaults to using ~/.ssh/id_dsa. If the file is password-protected, set the password with CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword . For a SFTP transfer (= file transfer over SSH), you would tell the plugin your public and private keys, so the plugin can login. If you Putty to connect and you like to export the key from there, please export as "Export OpenSSH Key" type. See also CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes , which needs to include flag 1 (CURLSSH_AUTH_PUBLICKEY) and you may need to use CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword to provide password for key file if needed. See also SSH_PRIVATE_KEYFILE option in CURL manual. Examples Login via SSH with public key: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "sftp://test.com:1222/test.fmp12" ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionVerbose "; $curl ; 1) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUpload "; $curl ; 1) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionConnectionTimeout "; $curl ; 10) ] # # specify paths to keys, public key optional as it is usually included in private key file: Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile"; $curl ; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile "; $curl ; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa.pub") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUserName "; $curl ; CURL Test::Name ) ] # # no password with private key! // Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionPassword "; $curl ; CURL Test::Password ) ] # # upload text or open a file path Set Variable [ $d ; Value: "Just a little bit text. Have fun!" ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetInputText "; $curl ; $d ) ] // Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.OpenInputFile "; $curl ; "/Users/test/Desktop/test.fmp12") ] # # do it! Set Field [ CURL Test::Result ; MBS (" CURL.Perform "; $curl ) ] Set Field [ CURL Test::debug ; MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; $curl ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Release "; $curl ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.New") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$curl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; $curl; "sftp://test.com:1222/test.fmp12" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionVerbose"; $curl; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionUpload"; $curl; 1) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionConnectionTimeout"; $curl; 10) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> specify paths to keys, public key optional as it is usually included in private key file:</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile"; $curl; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile"; $curl; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa.pub") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionUsername"; $curl; CURL Test::Name) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> no password with private key!</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionPassword"; $curl; CURL Test::Password) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> upload text or open a file path</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>"Just a little bit text. Have fun!" </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$d</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetInputText"; $curl; $d) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="False" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.OpenInputFile"; $curl; "/Users/test/Desktop/test.fmp12") </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">
    <Text> do it!</Text>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Perform"; $curl) </Calculation>
    <Field table="CURL Test" id="99999" name="Result "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="76" name="Set Field">
    <Calculation>MBS("CURL.GetDebugMessages"; $curl) </Calculation>
    <Field table="CURL Test" id="99999" name="debug "/>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.Release"; $curl) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.New CURL.OpenInputFile CURL.Perform CURL.Release CURL.SetOptionConnectionTimeout CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes CURL.SetOptionURL CURL.SetOptionUserName CURL.SetOptionVerbose Release notes Version 8.0 Changed CURL.SetOptionCAINFO , CURL.SetOptionCAPATH , CURL.SetOptionCookieFile , CURL.SetOptionCookieJar , CURL.SetOptionIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionNETRCFile , CURL.SetOptionRandomFile , CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile , CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile , CURL.SetOptionSSLCert , CURL.SetOptionSSLKey to use always UTF-8 on Mac/Linux and on Mac do the unicode transformation for decomposed characters to avoid trouble with special characters in file paths. Blog Entries MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 7.6pr3 Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 17th February 2022 CURL.SetOptionSSHKnownHosts - CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile
functions.description:
Sets the file path for the public key file. If not used, libcurl defaults to using ~/.ssh/id_dsa.pub. Usually the public key is part of private key file, so you don't need an extra public key file. For a SFTP transfer (= file transfer over SSH), you would tell the plugin your public and private keys, so the plugin can login. See also CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes , which needs to include flag 1 (CURLSSH_AUTH_PUBLICKEY) and you may need to use CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword to provide password for key file if needed. See also SSH_PUBLIC_KEYFILE option in CURL manual. Examples Login via SSH with public key: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "sftp://test.com:1222/test.fmp12" ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionVerbose "; $curl ; 1) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUpload "; $curl ; 1) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionConnectionTimeout "; $curl ; 10) ] # # specify paths to keys, public key optional as it is usually included in private key file: Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile "; $curl ; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile"; $curl ; "/Users/jameykey/.ssh/id_rsa.pub") ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionUserName "; $curl ; CURL Test::Name ) ] # # no password with private key! // Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionPassword "; $curl ; CURL Test::Password ) ] # # upload text or open a file path Set Variable [ $d ; Value: "Just a little bit text. Have fun!" ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetInputText "; $curl ; $d ) ] // Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.OpenInputFile "; $curl ; "/Users/test/Desktop/test.fmp12") ] # # do it! Set Field [ CURL Test::Result ; MBS (" CURL.Perform "; $curl ) ] Set Field [ CURL Test::debug ; MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; $curl ) ] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Release "; $curl ) ] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$curl</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionURL"; $curl; "sftp://test.com:1222/test.fmp12" ) </Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>

    </Value>
    <Repetition>

    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">

    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$result</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)"/>

</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.New CURL.OpenInputFile CURL.Release CURL.SetInputText CURL.SetOptionConnectionTimeout CURL.SetOptionSSHAuthTypes CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile CURL.SetOptionUpload CURL.SetOptionURL CURL.SetOptionUserName Release notes Version 8.0 Changed CURL.SetOptionCAINFO , CURL.SetOptionCAPATH , CURL.SetOptionCookieFile , CURL.SetOptionCookieJar , CURL.SetOptionIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionNETRCFile , CURL.SetOptionRandomFile , CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile , CURL.SetOptionSSHPublicKeyfile , CURL.SetOptionSSLCert , CURL.SetOptionSSLKey to use always UTF-8 on Mac/Linux and on Mac do the unicode transformation for decomposed characters to avoid trouble with special characters in file paths. Blog Entries MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 7.6pr3 Created 18th August 2014 , last changed 17th February 2022 CURL.SetOptionSSHPrivateKeyfile - CURL.SetOptionSSLCert 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The new public key file path.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSLCert
functions.description:
Sets the file path for the certificate. Pass a text string as parameter. The string should be the file name of your certificate. The default format is "PEM" and can be changed with CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType . With NSS this can also be the nickname of the certificate you wish to authenticate with. If you want to use a file from the current directory, please precede it with "./" prefix, in order to avoid confusion with a nickname. Starting with version 8.0 the plugin will always use UTF-8 encoding for file path on Linux and macOS. For macOS we also do the unicode character normalization for file names for you. For the GSX example, apple-cert+key.pem in our case is a text file containing the key and certificate: -----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY----- Proc-Type: 4,ENCRYPTED DEK-Info: AES-256-CBC,B8DCBDA00BFB07EB3CE3901334FC7028 lKa9vkyhSkx1N8PS+0gUsDLa5Ki36z9wuw9IdVQAeNuGYwPvpPwGzYiUWXE7p8H1 ... WHhQqB/FACH0XbOWWUtHInNlNVHFcKKtJdg/JIlkMQfvSD3XnSNLgLvOpr10L85Z -----END RSA PRIVATE KEY----- -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- MIIEuTCCA6GgAwIBAgIIVbEoCG6/FTIwDQYJKoZIhvcNAQELBQAwezE1MDMGA1UE .... AYf7yNIM0btoU2ymPrzwn02AKxnk6QRMqVkirDHSWew/mQfxlOg2HN2HJ1MQR9wC 3bxbgvJL1EFq9AAK5g== -----END CERTIFICATE----- You can normally just copy the files together with a text editor. See CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob to pass certificate as container or text. See also SSLCERT option in CURL manual. Examples Set a client SSL certificate: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionSSLCert"; $curl ; "/some/certfile.pem")] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType "; $curl ; "PEM")] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword "; $curl ; "secret")] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionSSLCert"; $curl; "/some/certfile.pem")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType"; $curl; "PEM")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS("CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword"; $curl; "secret")</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> Send request to Apple's gsx webservice: Copy Text Copy XML Set Variable [ $XMLRequest ; Value:""] #Start new session Set Variable [ $curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ")] # URL for web service Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "https://gsxapiut.apple.com:443/gsx-ws/services/emea/asp")] # Mark content as XML Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionHTTPHeader "; $curl ; "Content-Type: text/xml; charset=UTF-8")] # Pass XML content for request Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionPostFields "; $curl ; $XMLRequest )] # Certificate and private key in one file Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionSSLCert"; $curl ; "/Users/cs/Keys/apple-cert+key.pem")] # Root certificates Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionCAInfo "; $curl ; "/Users/cs/Keys/cacert.pem")] # SSL Key is in PEM Format Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType "; $curl ; "PEM")] # Password for key file Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword "; $curl ; "xxx")] # SSL Verification on Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyPeer "; $curl ; 1)] Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost "; $curl ; 1)] # use TLS v1 .2 Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion "; $curl ; 6)] #RUN now Set Field [ CURL Test::Result ; MBS (" CURL.Perform "; $curl )] #Check result Set Field [ CURL Test::Text ; MBS (" CURL.GetResultAsText "; $curl ; "UTF8")] Set Field [ CURL Test::debug ; MBS (" CURL.GetDebugMessages "; $curl )] #Cleanup Set Variable [ $result ; Value: MBS (" CURL.Release "; $curl )] <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">

    </Value>

  </Step>
  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

  <Step enable="True" id="89" name="# (comment)">

Value: Substitute( $xml ; " $serviceAccountNo $"; MBS (" Text.EncodeToXML "; $serviceAccountNo )) ] # Start CURL Set Variable [ $curl ; Value: MBS (" CURL.New ") ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionURL "; $curl ; "https://gsxapi.apple.com/gsx-ws/services/emea/asp") ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType "; $curl ; "PEM") ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionKeyPassword "; $curl ; $PrivateKeyPassword ) ] # pem file with private key and certificate from Apple Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS ("CURL.SetOptionSSLCert"; $curl ; "/Users/test/Desktop/test.pem") ] # some root certificates Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionCAInfo "; $curl ; "/Users/test/Desktop/cacert.pem") ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion "; $curl ; 6) // TLS v1 .2 ] Set Variable [ $r ; Value: MBS (" CURL.SetOptionTimeOut "; parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The file path to the certificate.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for text parameter. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .

functions.name: CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob
functions.description:
Set SSL client certificate from memory blob. Pass text or container value, which contains a client certificate. The format must be "P12" on Secure Transport or Schannel. The format must be "P12" or "PEM" on OpenSSL. The string "P12" or "PEM" must be specified with CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType . This option is an alternative to CURL.SetOptionSSLCert which instead expects a file name as input. See also SSLCERT_BLOB option in CURL manual. Examples Set certificate with container field: Copy Text Copy XML MBS ( "CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob"; $curl ; Settings::SSLCert ) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<fmxmlsnippet type="FMObjectList">
  <Step enable="True" id="141" name="Set Variable">
    <Value>
      <Calculation>MBS( "CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob"; $curl; Settings::SSLCert)</Calculation>
    </Value>
    <Repetition>
      <Calculation>1</Calculation>
    </Repetition>
    <Name>$r</Name>
  </Step>
</fmxmlsnippet> See also CURL.SetOptionCAInfoBlob CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob CURL.SetOptionSSLCert CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyType CURL.SetOptionSSLOptions CURL.SetOptionSSLVerifyHost CURL.SetOptionSSLVersion Release notes Version 10.4 Changed CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob to replace line endings for keys to LF if needed. Version 10.3 Added CURL.SetOptionIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCert , CURL.SetOptionProxyIssuerCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLCertBlob , CURL.SetOptionProxySSLKeyBlob , CURL.SetOptionSSLCertBlob and CURL.SetOptionSSLKeyBlob functions. Blog Entries Translating Insert from URL options for CURL to MBS Plugin calls MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 10.4pr4 MBS FileMaker Plugin, version 10.3pr6 Created 24th June 2020 , last changed 24th June 2020 CURL.SetOptionSSLCert - CURL.SetOptionSSLCertType 💬 Ask a question or report a problem

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The blob value. Either passed as text or passed as container value.

parameters.name: Encoding
parameters.description: The text encoding for value parameter when passing text. Default is UTF-8. Possible encoding names: ANSI, ISO-8859-1, Latin1, Mac, Native, UTF-8, DOS, Hex, Base64 or Windows. More listed in the FAQ .
